name: Watts Water Technologies, Inc.
description: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer of products and solutions that focus on the control, conservation, and quality of water. Headquartered in the United States, the company provides a comprehensive range of plumbing, heating, and water quality products for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. Their portfolio includes backflow prevention, flow control, drainage, and advanced water filtration systems. Through a commitment to innovation and sustainability, Watts Water Technologies helps customers manage water systems more efficiently, ensuring safety and reliability in building infrastructure across the globe.
